summary: End-to-end testing of HerNet app (backend + frontend). All 22 backend pytest cases passed (auth for user/authority/admin, contacts CRUD, SOS trigger/active/resolve, admin stats/users, location ping, newsletter, contact, role-based 403s, unauth 401s). Frontend flows all pass: Landing renders with LoginCard + role tabs + newsletter/contact forms; admin login routes to /admin with stats + users/alerts tables; user registration routes to /app with SOS button/location/contacts/alert history; adding an emergency contact works; 2.5s SOS hold triggers alert (toast shown, row appears in history); authority dashboard shows active alerts feed; selecting and resolving an alert removes it (2→1); ProtectedRoute redirects unauthenticated user from /app and /admin to /login.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS allow_origins reads env CORS_ORIGINS defaulting to '*'; with allow_credentials=False this is fine. If in future cookies are used, switch to explicit origins.
SOSButton uses onMouseLeave=cancel which can abort a legitimate hold if the cursor briefly exits the button area; consider window-level mouseup tracking for robustness.
Admin seeding is idempotent and resets password to env ADMIN_PASSWORD on change — good.
Backend excludes _id in all reads via projection — correct.
JWT stored in localStorage is standard for Bearer auth; XSS risk applies like any SPA — acceptable for this app.
test_credentials: Admin admin@hernet.com / HerNet@Admin2025 (seeded). Test users/authorities created per-run via /api/auth/register with unique emails.
seed_data_creation: Registered fe_user_<ts>@test.com and fe_auth_<ts>@test.com, fe_auth2_<ts>@test.com plus one emergency contact and SOS alerts during UI test. Newsletter/contact rows created with unique emails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py at /app/backend/tests/test_hernet_api.py covers full API surface and is idempotent (unique run-id emails). Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_hernet_api.py -v. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var.
